Progress Indicator

Source: Figma Progress Indicator (2349:2). 6px horizontal bar with type variants and optional X% caption below.

Bare bar — 6 type variants
Default · 40%
Primary · 50%
Hard · 35%
Success · 70%
Warning · 60%
Error · 25%
With hint (Progres_Bar_Core_With_Hint)

X% caption sits below the fill end. P5 (10/13).
